name: Card cover images
description: Solid color or image banner at the top of the card face.

name: Generic login/register error messages
description: Currently raw ApiError.message is shown on login/register. Before public deployment, map ApiError by status code to a generic 'Invalid email or password' string to prevent user enumeration. Keeping detailed errors for now during development. (From security audit 2026-04-17.)

name: Board color theme
description: Accent colors applied to buttons, label defaults, and header elements beyond just the background.

name: List limit (WIP limits)
description: Max card count per list, list header turns red when exceeded.

name: Card templates
description: Predefined card structures for repeating work.

name: Watching
description: Subscribe to notifications on a card or board.

name: API: board update validation + endpoint for background fields
description: Extend board update Zod schema with optional backgroundType and backgroundValue. Validate hex regex for color, preset ID enum for gradient, both null if type is null. BoardService.update writes columns. GET response includes both fields.

name: List move/copy
description: Reorganize lists between boards.

name: Member roles
description: Admin (change settings, add/remove members), Member (edit cards), Viewer (read-only).

name: Labels/tags
description: Board-scoped label sets, multiple labels per card. Card face shows colored chips. Filtering by label dims non-matching cards (non-destructive, preserves spatial context).

name: Wire api() to push errors to store before rethrowing
description: Modify packages/web/src/lib/api.ts: wrap fetch in try/catch to capture network errors (status: null, code: NETWORK_ERROR). Push to errorStore before throwing ApiError on non-ok responses. api() still throws the same errors — no behavioral change to callers.

name: Error store (errorStore.svelte.ts)
description: New file packages/web/src/lib/errorStore.svelte.ts. Svelte 5 runes state holding ErrorEntry[]. add() prepends with UUID+timestamp, caps at 50 entries. clear() empties. Registers window unhandledrejection listener on first browser import.

name: Global Error Indicator
description: Add a unified error indicator in the nav bar so any failed API request is visible immediately without per-call-site changes. A Svelte 5 runes store holds up to 50 recent errors; api() pushes every failure before rethrowing; a red badge with count appears in the header nav. Clicking opens a dropdown listing recent failures with method, path, status, and message. No auto-clear — user clicks 'Clear all'. Unhandled rejection fallback via window.addEventListener.

name: Card covers on/off
description: Board-level toggle to disable card cover images for a denser view.

name: Web: background picker in board settings (color tab + gradient swatches)
description: Add Background section to board settings UI. Two tabs: Color (native input[type=color] + Reset button) and Gradient (10 swatches grid with checkmark on selected). Save calls PATCH /boards/:id with optimistic update.

name: Web: apply board background to board page container
description: Derive CSS background string from board.backgroundType + board.backgroundValue using shared preset list. Apply inline style to board container. List columns use rgba(255,255,255,0.88) + backdrop-filter blur only when backgroundType is set.

name: Members/assignments
description: Assign cards to users, show avatars on card face.

name: Board Background (Color + Gradient Presets)
description: Add per-board background setting with two modes: solid color (hex) or one of 10 curated gradient presets. Storage: background_type ('color'|'gradient'|null) and background_value columns on boards table. Preset source of truth in @kanbang/shared as BACKGROUND_GRADIENT_PRESETS. List columns get semi-transparent white bg with backdrop blur when a board background is active. Null means app default (no backfill on existing boards).

name: Copy/move card
description: Copy or move cards between lists or boards. Copy dialog with checkboxes to keep checklists/attachments/comments.

name: Web Proxy Hardening
description: Harden hooks.server.ts: (1) Header allowlist on the API proxy — only forward cookie, content-type, accept, accept-language; drop x-forwarded-*, authorization, host, origin, referer. (2) Cache /auth/me per session cookie with 30s TTL using module-level Map to avoid a backend round-trip on every sub-request. (3) Invalidate cache on successful POST /auth/logout. Addresses security review findings #1 and #2.

name: Voting
description: Members can upvote cards, vote count shown on card face. Useful for prioritization and feedback boards.

name: Activity export
description: CSV or JSON export of all cards and metadata.

name: Attachments
description: File uploads or URL links per card.

name: Card aging
description: Cards untouched for a configurable period get a faded/dusty visual treatment.

name: Card filtering
description: Filter bar at top of board accepting labels, assignees, due date ranges. Non-destructive: dims non-matching cards rather than hiding them to preserve spatial context.

name: Board templates
description: Start new boards from a saved layout.

name: Sort list
description: Sort cards within a list by due date, name, or date created.

name: ErrorIndicator component: red badge + dropdown panel
description: New file packages/web/src/lib/components/ErrorIndicator.svelte. Red dot + count button, absolutely-positioned dropdown panel (360px wide, max 400px, scrollable), transparent fixed backdrop for outside-click dismiss. Shows method/path/status and code:message per entry.

name: Comments
description: Threaded discussion per card with @mentions.

name: Board visibility settings
description: Private (only members), workspace/team, or public visibility per board.

name: Header allowlist on the API proxy
description: In packages/web/src/hooks.server.ts, replace verbatim header forwarding with buildProxyHeaders() that only copies cookie, content-type, accept, accept-language. All other headers dropped.

name: DB migration: backgroundType and backgroundValue columns on boards
description: Add backgroundType text('background_type', {enum:['color','gradient']}) and backgroundValue text('background_value') to boards schema. Run pnpm db:generate then pnpm db:migrate.

name: Table/spreadsheet view
description: Flat list of all cards across lists.

name: Board rules / automation
description: Trigger/action pairs (e.g. when card moves to Done, mark all checklist items complete; when due date is tomorrow, add label Urgent).

name: Dashboard view
description: Summary stats (cards per list, overdue count, etc.).

name: In-memory /auth/me cache with 30s TTL
description: Add module-level Map<sessionCookie, {user, expiresAt}> in hooks.server.ts. resolveUser() checks cache, fetches on miss/expiry. Failures fall through to locals.user=null and are NOT cached.

name: Required fields
description: Enforce that cards in certain lists must have due date, assignee, or label before they can be moved.

name: Password reset flow
description: Forgot password page with email-based reset tokens. Requires SMTP setup.

name: Calendar view
description: Cards plotted by due date in a calendar view.

name: Guest access
description: Add users to a single board without full workspace membership.

name: Mount ErrorIndicator in +layout.svelte + unit tests
description: Add <ErrorIndicator /> to nav-right in packages/web/src/routes/+layout.svelte (left of username). Add errorStore.test.ts (add/clear/cap) and extend api.test.ts (500 adds entry, network failure adds null-status entry, 2xx leaves count 0).

name: Recurring cards
description: Auto-create cards on a schedule.

name: Card quick-edit
description: Hover shows pencil icon, clicking opens inline popover to edit labels, due date, members, and title without opening the full card modal.

name: Card numbering
description: Auto-incrementing card IDs scoped to the board (like GitHub issues, e.g. #47).

name: Shared package: BACKGROUND_GRADIENT_PRESETS constant
description: New file packages/shared/src/background-presets.ts exporting BACKGROUND_GRADIENT_PRESETS readonly array of {id, name, css} and BackgroundGradientId type. Export from package barrel.

name: Invite links
description: Shareable URL granting access at a specified role level, with ability to disable/regenerate.

name: Tests: shared snapshot, API integration (invalid/valid backgrounds), E2E happy path
description: Unit test snapshots preset list. API integration tests: reject invalid hex, reject unknown gradient ID, accept valid color/gradient, accept null. E2E: pick gradient in settings, reload, verify persisted.

name: Default due date reminder
description: Board-level setting for when notification reminders fire (e.g. 1 day before due).

name: Activity log
description: Audit trail of all changes per card and board.

name: Invalidate auth cache on logout + proxy hardening tests
description: Delete cache entry when proxy sees successful POST /auth/v1/auth/logout. Add Vitest tests: x-forwarded-for not forwarded, cookie+content-type are forwarded, two same-session requests = one /auth/me call, logout clears cache.

name: Board search
description: Highlights matching cards in place (dims non-matching), does not navigate away from the board.
